title: becium fimbriatum var. bequaertii
intro: Becium fimbriatum var. bequaertii, also known as African blue basil, is a plant species in the Lamiaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Becium fimbriatum var. bequaertii include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as an antiseptic. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
